verses.text: Tua ciangin amaute in mipi' zakin Moses' laibute sim uh a, Pasian' mite' kikhopna-ah Ammon mi leh Moab mite a kihel ngeilohna ding thu kiphawkkhia hi
bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in an leh tui tawh Israel mite na dawnlo uh a, amaute a samsia dingin Balaam cial zawsop uh hi. Ahi zongin i Pasian in tua samsiatna thupha-in hong heisak hi
Mite in hih thukham a zak uh ciangin Israel mite lak panin gamdang suan peuhmah khenkhia uh hi
Ahi zongin tua hun ma-in, i Pasian' biakinn sunga vankoihna inndeite a uk dingin a kiseh, Tobiah tawh a kimeltheih siampi Eliashib in

Levi mite, lasate, leh kongcingte tungah piak dingin a kisawl an tawh biakna, paknamtui, umlebeelte, sawmah khat a kipia an, leenggahzu, leh sathau, leh siampite-a' dingin a kipia nate a koihna ngei uh inndei lianpi khat, Tobiah-a' dingin bawlsak hi

Babylon kumpipa Artakzaksis in a uk kum sawmthum leh nihna kumin ama kiangah pai ka hih manin hih thu a pian' laitakin Jerusalem-ah ka om kei hi. Tawlkhat khit ciangin kumpipa kiangah a khuan ka ngen a
Jerusalem-ah ka ciahkik hi. Tua ciangin Tobiah-a' dingin Pasian' biakinn huang sungah inndei khat a vaihawmsakna thu, Eliashib' gamtat hoihlohna ka phawkkhia hi
Hih thu-ah lungkim hetlo ka hih manin inndei sung panin Tobiah' van teng ka lawnkhia hi
Tua ciangin tua inndei a sian'sakna ding uh, leh Pasian' biakinn-a umlebeelte, an tawh biakna leh paknamtui a koihkikna dingun thu ka pia hi
Levi mite' ngah dingte amau' tungah kipialo ahih manin Levi mite leh lasate in a nasep ngeite uh nusia-in a lote uhah na a sepna uh zong ka phawkkhia hi
Tua ahih ciangin uliante tungah ka lungkim kei a, “Bang hangin Pasian' biakinn kinusiacip ahi hiam?” ka ci hi. Tua hi a, amaute kaikhawm kikin amau' sepna ngei mun ciatah ka pangsakkik hi
Tua ciangin Judah mite khempeuh in an, leenggahzu, leh sathau sung pan sawmah khat hong paipihin vankoihna innte-ah hong tun' uh hi

Tua ciangin tua vankoihna innte a kem dingin siampi Shelemiah, laithei Zadok, leh Levi mi Pedaiah, leh amaute a huh dingin Mattaniah' tapa Zakkur, a tapa Hanan ka seh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute mi muan'huai ahi uh hi. Amau' nasep pen a sanggamte uh tungah amau' tahn ciat uh a hawmkhia ding uh ahi hi
Ka Pasian aw, hih thu tawh kisai-in kei hong phawk in la, ka Pasian' biakinn leh a nasepna dingin ka sepsa gamtat hoihte maimangsak kei in

Tua hun lai-in Judah gamsungah mite in Sabbath ni-in leenggah sukin, a khawhsate uh khawmin late tungah suanin, leenggah, thei, leh van namkim, Sabbath ni-in Jerusalem-ah hong puakna ka mu hi. Tua ni-in na a zuakna uh hangin ka lungkimlohna amaute tungah ka gen hi
Jerusalem khuasunga teng Taia khuamite in zong ngasa leh van namkim hong paipihin Judah mite tung leh Jerusalem khuasungah Sabbath ni-in zuak uh hi
Tua ciangin Judah uliante tungah lungkim loin amaute kiangah, “Bang hangin hih bangin hoihlohna gamta-in Sabbath ni ninsak ngam na hi uh hiam

Na pu na pate uh tu-a bang teekin a gamtat manin eite tung leh hih khuapi tungah hih bang siatna khempeuh hong tung hilo ahi hiam? Tua hinapi-in note in Sabbath ni nitsakna tawh Israel tungah hehna tamzaw na tungsak uh hi,” ka ci hi

Tua hi a, Sabbath ni ding khuamial ciangin kongpite a kikhakna ding ka sawl a, Sabbath bei khit mateng a kihon'lohna dingin thu ka pia hi. Tua ciangin, Sabbath ni-in khua sungah van hong kilutpih lohna dingin kongpite a cing dingin ka nasemte pawlkhat ka koih hi
Tua ahih manin sumbukte leh na nam tuamtuam a zuakte, khatvei nihvei khawng Jerusalem khua pualamah giak uh hi

Ahi zongin amaute hilhkholin amaute kiangah, “Bang hangin kulh gei-ah giak na hi uh hiam? Nong giah kik uh leh note tungah thu kong bawl ding hi,” ka ci hi. Tua huna kipanin Sabbath ni-in amaute hong pai nawnlo uh hi

Tua ciangin Sabbath ni a siangtho-in a omsak theihna dingun amaute kisian'suah tawmin kongpite hong cin'na dingun Levi mite ka sawl hi. Ka Pasian aw, hih thu-ah zong hong phawk in la, na itna tawh kizui-in siatna panin kei hong pengsak in
Tua hun lai mahin zong Judah mite in Ashdod numei, Ammon numei, leh Moab numeite a ten'pihna
leh a tate uh kimkhat in Ashdod kampau a zatna, leh Judah kampau zang theiloin, amau pau ciat bek a zat theihna thu ka mukhia hi

Amaute taigawpin ka samsia a, pawlkhat satin a sam uh ka bawhsak gawp hi. Tua ciangin Pasian' min tawh amaute ka kiciamsak a, “Note in amau' tapate' zi dingin na tanute uh na pia kei ding uh a, na tapate uh zi ding ahi a, nomau' zi dingin ahi zongin amaute' tanu na la kei ding uh hi

Israel kumpipa Solomon zong tua bang numeite' hangin khial hilo ahi hiam? Minam tampite lakah amah tawh a kibang kumpi khat zong omlo a, ama Pasian in amah itin, Israel khempeuh tungah kumpi-in amah koih hi; ahi ta zongin gamdang numeite in amah nangawn khialsakzo hi
Tua ahih ciangin Solomon aw, nangma gamtatnate hong zui-in, gamdang numeite ten'pihna tawh hih siatna lian khempeuh gamta-in i Pasian tungah hong zuautat ding ka hi uh hiam?” ka cisak hi
Siampi lianpenpa Eliashib' tapa Jehoiada' tapate khat pen Horonaim khuami Sanbalat' makpa na hi hi. Tua ahih manin keima kiang panin amah ka hawlkhia hi
Ka Pasian aw, amaute in siampi nasepna leh siampite leh Levi mite' thuciamna siasak uh ahih manin amaute thei ta in
Tua bangin gamdang tawh a kizom nate khempeuh panin amaute ka siangsak a, siampite leh Levi mite a nasep ngei mah uhah ka semsak kik hi
Tua ciangin a kiseh hunin zat dingin cih ding sing tawh biakna leh anpal tawh biakna ding ka vaihawmsak hi. Ka Pasian aw, a hoih lamin kei hong phawk in.
